title: selenicereus grandiflorus
intro: Selenicereus grandiflorus, also known as Queen of the Night or Night-Blooming Cereus, is a species of cactus native to Central and South America. The plant is prized for its vibrant, funnel-shaped flowers that bloom only at night and have been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selenicereus grandiflorus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and even lower blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
